# ReviewBoostPRO

> ReviewBoostPRO is India's #1 WhatsApp-based Google review management tool for clinics, doctors, and local businesses. It helps Indian business owners get more Google reviews via WhatsApp in 2 seconds — without any API, tech skills, or setup complexity. Unhappy customers are routed to private feedback first, so the public Google rating only ever goes up. Priced at ₹499/month with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

## What ReviewBoostPRO Does
- Sends personalised WhatsApp review requests to customers in one click
- Smart routing: 4-5 star ratings go to Google, 1-3 star ratings go to private feedback inbox
- CSV bulk upload to send review requests to multiple customers at once
- Live analytics dashboard showing sends, opens, Google redirects, and private feedback
- Works with any WhatsApp number — no Business API or approvals needed
- Built specifically for Indian businesses and clinics

## Who It's For
- Doctors and clinic owners in India (dental, skin, gynaec, ortho, general, paediatric)
- Restaurants and cafes
- Salons and spas
- Pharmacies and medical stores
- Hotels and homestays
- Any local Indian business that serves customers in person

## Pricing
- ₹499/month after 14-day free trial
- No credit card required to start
- Cancel anytime
- Includes everything: unlimited WhatsApp requests, smart routing, dashboard, CSV upload, feedback inbox

## Key URLs
- [Home & Signup](https://reviewboost.in/index.html)
- [Blog](https://reviewboost.in/blog.html)

## Blog Posts
- [How Indian Businesses Get 3x More Google Reviews Using WhatsApp](https://reviewboost.in/blog-how-to-get-google-reviews.html): Proven WhatsApp review strategy for Indian local businesses, including templates and timing tips.
- [How to Get Google Reviews via WhatsApp for Your Clinic in India](https://reviewboost.in/blog-whatsapp-google-reviews-clinic-india.html): Step-by-step guide for doctors and clinic owners with 3 WhatsApp message templates and clinic-type timing guide.
- [Why Your Clinic Doesn't Show Up on Google Maps — And How to Fix It](https://reviewboost.in/blog-why-clinic-not-showing-google-maps.html): 8 exact reasons clinics are invisible on Google Maps with step-by-step fixes.
- [How Many Google Reviews Does Your Clinic Need to Rank #1 Locally?](https://reviewboost.in/blog-how-many-google-reviews-clinic-rank-1.html): City-wise and specialty-wise review benchmarks for Indian clinics, plus review velocity strategy.

## Key Facts
- Made in India 🇮🇳
- Works via standard WhatsApp — no API needed
- Supabase-powered backend
- GA4 analytics integrated
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required
- Support: support@reviewboost.in
- Website: https://reviewboost.in
